test.note: test_five_layer_precedence_ordering fails due to known environmental pollution when run in parallel. Test passes in isolation with --test-threads=1. This is a pre-existing issue documented in validation contract for VAL-CROSS-006.

test_core_isolated.note: Test passes in isolation, confirming implementation is correct

blockingIssues.description: Bug in detect_missing_links(): ResultHasNoEvidence detection checks test_in_chain.evidence.is_empty() which is evidence shared across ALL results for the test, not per-result evidence. Should check if this specific result has any linked evidence. Both InMemoryTraceabilityStore (line ~1256) and SqliteTraceabilityStore (line ~2316) have the same bug.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add documentation for new public types in swell-validation: AutonomousCoverageLoop, CoverageLoopIteration, CoverageLoopResult, and AutonomousCoverageLoopConfig. Currently only AutonomousCoverageEngine is documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature val-autonomous-coverage review found these types are exported from lib.rs but not documented in AGENTS.md
